import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import axiosClient from '../api/axiosClient'; import { Star, Heart, Map, Grid, List, ChevronRight, Waves, Flower2, Dumbbell, Wifi, MapPin } from 'lucide-react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { getRandomHeritageImage } from '../utils/images'; const Flats = () => { const [flats, setFlats] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); // Filter states (mock for UI) const [amenities, setAmenities] = useState({ pool: false, spa: false, gym: false, wifi: true }); const [propertyTypes, setPropertyTypes] = useState({ boutique: true, heritage: false, resort: false }); useEffect(() => { fetchFlats(); }, []); const fetchFlats = async () => { try { const res = await axiosClient.get('/flats'); setFlats(res.data.data); setLoading(false); } catch { // Create some beautiful mock data if no backend connection const mockData = Array(6).fill(0).map((_, i) => ({ _id: `mock-${i}`, title: i % 2 === 0 ? 'The Oberoi Amarvilas' : 'Taj Lake Palace', location: i % 2 === 0 ? 'Agra, Uttar Pradesh' : 'Udaipur, Rajasthan', rent: i % 2 === 0 ? 35000 : 48000, rating: 4.9, type: i % 2 === 0 ? 'HERITAGE' : 'RESORT', tags: i % 2 === 0 ? ['TAJ VIEW', 'AWARD-WINNING SPA'] : ['LAKE VIEW', 'PRIVATE BOAT'] })); setFlats(mockData); setLoading(false); } }; const toggleAmenity = (key) => setAmenities(prev => ({ ...prev, [key]: !prev[key] })); const togglePropertyType = (key) => setPropertyTypes(prev => ({ ...prev, [key]: !prev[key] })); return (
{/* Header Breadcrumb & Title */}

toggleAmenity('pool')} className={`flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-4 rounded-xl cursor-pointer border transition ${amenities.pool ? 'border-[#EF6C00] bg-[#EF6C00]/10 text-[#EF6C00]' : 'border-white/10 text-gray-400 hover:border-white/30'}`}> Pool
toggleAmenity('spa')} className={`flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-4 rounded-xl cursor-pointer border transition ${amenities.spa ? 'border-[#EF6C00] bg-[#EF6C00]/10 text-[#EF6C00]' : 'border-white/10 text-gray-400 hover:border-white/30'}`}> Spa
toggleAmenity('gym')} className={`flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-4 rounded-xl cursor-pointer border transition ${amenities.gym ? 'border-[#EF6C00] bg-[#EF6C00]/10 text-[#EF6C00]' : 'border-white/10 text-gray-400 hover:border-white/30'}`}> Gym
toggleAmenity('wifi')} className={`flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-4 rounded-xl cursor-pointer border transition ${amenities.wifi ? 'border-[#EF6C00] bg-[#EF6C00]/10 text-[#EF6C00]' : 'border-white/10 text-gray-400 hover:border-white/30'}`}> Wifi
{/* Popular Regions */}

Popular Regions

{/* Right Content Area */}
{/* Top Toolbar */}
Sort by:
{/* Flats Grid */} {loading ? (
{[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6].map(n => (
))}
) : (
{flats.map((flat, index) => (
{flat.type || (index % 3 === 0 ? 'BOUTIQUE' : index % 2 === 0 ? 'HERITAGE' : 'RESORT')}

{flat.title || "Luxury Retreat"}

{parseFloat(flat.rating || 4.9).toFixed(1)}
{flat.location || 'Jaipur, Rajasthan'}
{(flat.tags || ['INFINITY POOL', 'FINE DINING']).map(tag => ( {tag} ))}
₹{flat.rent ? flat.rent.toLocaleString() : '25,000'} / night
))}
)}
); }; export default Flats;

{/* Hero Content */}
Experience the Soul
of India Discover handpicked heritage palaces and luxury resorts across the vibrant heart of the subcontinent. {/* Search Bar Plugin */}
e.target.type = 'date'} onBlur={(e) => e.target.type = 'text'} />

Curated Collections

240+ Properties

Goa

315+ Properties

Kerala

Udaipur

110+ Properties

"

"StayIndia transformed our family vacation. Staying at the Rambagh Palace was like stepping back in time with all the modern comforts. Truly world-class service."

Ananya Sharma

Global Travel Enthusiast

); }; export default Home;

import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; const Offers = () => { const offers = [ { id: 1, tag: 'LIMITED TIME', title: 'Last Minute Monsoon Deals', desc: 'Escape the heat and embrace the rain. Enjoy up to 30% off on premium villa stays across Western Ghats and Kerala.', date: 'Valid until Aug 31, 2026', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1544365558-35aa4afcf11f?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80', btn: 'Book Your Monsoon Retreat', featured: true }, { id: 2, tag: 'SEASONAL', title: 'Early Bird Winter Bookings', desc: 'Plan ahead for the snow. Book your winter stay 90 days in advance and save 25% on luxury mountain suites.', date: 'Valid thru Dec 15, 2026', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1455587734955-081b22074882?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80', btn: 'Claim Offer' }, { id: 3, tag: 'BANK PARTNER', title: 'HDFC Bank Exclusive', desc: 'Get an additional 10% instant discount + 5x Reward Points when you pay with HDFC Bank Credit Cards.', code: 'STAYHDFC10', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556742049-0cfed4f6a45d?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80', btn: 'Apply Code' }, { id: 4, tag: 'EXPERIENCE', title: 'Royal Spa Package', desc: 'Book a 3-night stay at any Royal Heritage property and receive a complimentary 90-minute Ayurvedic spa session for two.', status: 'Active', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600334089648-b0d9d3028eb2?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80', btn: 'Book Now' }, { id: 5, tag: 'GOLD & PLATINUM', title: 'Members-Only Breakfast', desc: 'Enjoy complimentary gourmet breakfast and airport transfers on all bookings made directly through our app.', status: 'Permanent Offer', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1533089860892-a7c6f0a88666?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80', btn: 'Join Now' }, { id: 6, tag: 'ROMANCE', title: 'Weekday Honeymoon Special', desc: 'Celebrate your love with a midweek getaway. 20% off room rates plus a bottle of premium wine on arrival.', date: 'Valid Thru Oct 31, 2026', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517436073-3b1b13d29a65?auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80', // Romantic wine context btn: 'Claim Offer' }, { id: 7, tag: 'PREMIUM PARTNER', title: 'Amex Platinum Escapes', desc: 'Exclusive 15% discount for American Express Platinum Cardholders on all beachfront properties.', code: 'AMEXPLATI15', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1550136513-548af4445338?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80', btn: 'Apply Code' } ]; return (
{/* Header */}

{offers[0].title}

{offers[0].desc}

 {/* Regular Offers Grid */}

{offer.tag}

{offer.title}

{offer.date ? 'Valid Thru' : offer.code ? 'Promo Code' : 'Status'} {offer.date ? offer.date.split('Valid thru ')[1] || offer.date.split('Valid Thru ')[1] : offer.code || offer.status}
))}
